backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the TrackFlow backend, defining types (UserProfile, Habit, Activity, PaymentRequest, Coupon), state maps, and authorization helpers for admin/user/owner access control with plan-based habit limits.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two frontend fix features (LoginPage blank screen and App.tsx auth/routing issues) to their affected files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one- to two-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component's purpose and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the full design token system (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the TrackFlow React app, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component that sets up TanStack Router with hash-based history, defines public and protected route layouts with Internet Identity auth guards, and registers all page routes.
frontend/src/components/activities/EditA: Modal dialog component for editing an existing activity's habit, name, start/end times, earnings, productive flag, and notes, submitting changes via the `useUpdateActivity` mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/CouponMana: Admin UI component for creating and deleting discount coupons, with a form for code, discount percent, usage limit, and expiry date, plus a list of existing coupons.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentsQu: Admin UI component that displays pending payment requests and allows admins to approve or reject them, showing user name, plan, cycle, coupon, and transaction details.
frontend/src/components/admin/PlatformSt: Admin dashboard widget that fetches and displays four platform-wide stats (total users, activities, habits, payment requests) as icon cards with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersTable: Admin table component listing all users with search filtering, principal copy, and an inline plan-change selector per user row.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Activi: Dashboard component that renders a chronological list of today's activities with inline edit (name and earnings) and delete capabilities.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AddAct: Dashboard form component for logging a new activity, capturing habit, custom name, start/end times, productivity flag, earnings, and notes for a selected date.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/HabitP: Renders a progress bar for a single habit showing current vs. goal hours for the selected day or week, with completion indicator and percentage label.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/StatsC: Displays a single statistic card with a label, value, icon, and color theme using a predefined color map for indigo, emerald, amber, and purple variants.
frontend/src/components/habits/HabitForm: Modal dialog for creating or editing a habit, with fields for name, goal type (daily/weekly), goal hours, and color selection, using create/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/habits/UpgradePl: Modal that informs users they've hit their plan's habit limit and presents Starter and Premium upgrade options with pricing, redirecting to the pricing page on confirmation.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Simple footer component displaying copyright year, app name, and a referral link to caffeine.ai with UTM parameters based on the current hostname.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Main layout wrapper that composes a collapsible Sidebar with a scrollable main content area and Footer, adjusting left margin based on sidebar collapse state.
frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.t: Collapsible sidebar with navigation links, admin-conditional menu item, logo, and logout functionality; shows tooltips for icons when collapsed.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, habits, activities, payments, coupons, and admin operations using the ICP actor pattern.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter/Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines the OKLCH-based design token CSS variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ActivitiesPage.tsx: Full-featured activities list page with filtering by habit/productivity/date, pagination, bulk delete, single delete, and an edit modal for individual activity records.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin panel page gated by an admin role check, displaying platform stats and tabbed sections for managing payments, users, and coupons.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsPage.tsx: Analytics page showing time distribution, daily earnings, and productivity charts via Recharts, with date-range filtering and a paywall for non-free plan features.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying per-day stats cards, an add-activity form, an activity timeline, and habit progress bars derived from the user's activities and habits.
frontend/src/pages/HabitsPage.tsx: Displays the user's habits list with add/edit/delete functionality, enforces plan-based habit limits, and shows an upgrade modal when the limit is reached.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the TrackFlow login page with Internet Identity authentication, redirecting authenticated users to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Handles UPI payment submission for plan upgrades, including coupon validation, price calculation, and transaction ID entry.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Shows the three-tier pricing plans (Free, Starter, Premium) and handles plan selection, profile setup for new users, and navigation to the payment page.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays and allows editing of the user's profile (phone number), shows activity stats, and provides data export and account deletion functionality.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for TrackFlow, a React/TypeScript/Motoko habit tracker with Internet Identity auth, UPI payments, INR pricing, and an admin panel; documents features, architecture, and known issues.
